image.title: NAR Francis, M Le Bideau, P Jardot, C Grimaldier, D Raoult, JY Bou Khalil, B La Scola

item.title: High-speed large-scale automated isolation of SARS-CoV-2 from clinical samples using miniaturized co-culture coupled to high-content screening.
